creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Goran Mekić from comment #9)

It's perfectly fine and actually this is how community projects like FreeBSD ports are working. So I appreciate this. My only concern was, that the patch didn't reflected dependencies changes. Now both nbxmpp and gajim are updated, thank you!

PS. Somehow you last name was garbled in commit messages, while I did that from UTF-8 locale. Sorry for that.
